arts.ttl: Liverpool to compete with Tottenham and Newcastle for 24-year-old Ligue 1 ace
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly keen on signing the former Manchester United midfielder Angel Gomes. They will face competition from Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United as well. According to Football Insider, all three clubs sent scouts to watch the 24-year-old in action earlier this week.
